hero.title: Developer Student Club Darmstadt
hero.subtitle: Bridging the gap between students and industry through innovation, collaboration, and tech excellence
hero.description: Join TU Darmstadt's premier developer community where students connect with leading companies, participate in exciting hackathons, and build the future of technology together.

about.title: What is DSC Darmstadt?
about.mission: We are a student-led community passionate about technology and innovation. Our mission is to connect students with industry leaders, provide hands-on learning opportunities, and foster a collaborative environment where the next generation of developers can thrive.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Pushing boundaries and exploring cutting-edge technologies

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Building strong partnerships between students and industry

upcoming.title: Upcoming Events
upcoming.description: Don't miss out on our latest hackathons, workshops, and networking events

events.noUpcomingEvents: No upcoming events at the moment. Stay tuned!

featured.description: Discover innovative solutions created by our community

events.title: Events
events.description: Join us for exciting hackathons, technical workshops, and networking opportunities with industry leaders.
events.noUpcomingEvents: No upcoming events at the moment. Stay tuned for exciting announcements!
events.registerNow: Register now to secure your spot!

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Explore innovative projects developed by our community members and discover the power of collaborative development.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Developer Student Club Darmstadt is a vibrant community of tech enthusiasts at TU Darmstadt. We bridge the gap between academic learning and industry practice through hands-on projects, hackathons, and collaborative events with leading technology companies.

items.connect: Connect students with industry professionals and mentors
items.skills: Develop practical skills through workshops and coding sessions
items.community: Build a supportive community of developers and innovators
items.opportunities: Create opportunities for internships and career advancement

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Meet the passionate individuals who make DSC Darmstadt a thriving community of developers and innovators.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Ready to join our community or have questions? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.formDescription: Have a question or want to get involved? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you soon!
